metadata.name: Structured Data Extraction
metadata.description: Extract structured fields from text using OpenAI, demonstrating parallel steps and new input types.

text.description: The text to extract data from.

fields.description: JSON array of field categories to extract.

confidence_threshold.description: Minimum confidence score for extracted items.

prompt.system: You extract structured data from text. Return only JSON.
prompt.user:
Extract all person and organization names from this text. Return as a JSON array of strings. Only include items with confidence >= {{ inputs.confidence_threshold }}.

{{ inputs.text }}

prompt.system: You extract structured data from text. Return only JSON.
prompt.user:
Extract all dates and temporal references from this text. Return as a JSON array of objects with 'date' and 'context' fields. Only include items with confidence >= {{ inputs.confidence_threshold }}.

{{ inputs.text }}

prompt.system: You extract structured data from text. Return only JSON.
prompt.user:
Extract all monetary amounts, quantities, and numerical values from this text. Return as a JSON array of objects with 'value', 'unit', and 'context' fields. Only include items with confidence >= {{ inputs.confidence_threshold }}.

{{ inputs.text }}

prompt.system: You compile structured extraction results into a clean report.
